productDisplayName: Lotus Herbals UV Screen Matte Gel 50g
description: Safe sun UV screen matte gel which comes in a plastic tube with a flip cap, innovative sunblock with SPF 50 UVB which is totally non oily and provides a fresh and clean finish to the face, neck and hands, protects against all forms of sun induced damage: skin tan, sun burn, pre-mature ageing and skin cancer, contains extracts of horse chestnut, comfrey and vanilla
